name: Aktis Oncology, Inc.
summary: Aktis Oncology is a clinical-stage oncology company developing targeted radiopharmaceuticals using a proprietary miniprotein radioconjugate platform. Its lead candidate, [225Ac]Ac-AKY-1189, targets Nectin-4 and is in Phase 1b trials for locally advanced or metastatic urothelial cancer and other solid tumors. The company focuses on alpha-emitting radioisotopes, end-to-end supply chain development, and expanding radiopharmaceutical use beyond traditional nuclear medicine settings.

products.name: [225Ac]Ac-AKY-1189
products.description: Lead miniprotein radioconjugate targeting Nectin-4, conjugated to actinium-225 alpha-emitting radioisotope, in Phase 1b trials for urothelial cancer and other Nectin-4 expressing solid tumors.

products.name: AKY-1189 imaging radioconjugate
products.description: Imaging radioisotope conjugated to AKY-1189 miniprotein for patient selection and tumor visualization prior to therapeutic treatment.

products.name: Miniprotein Radioconjugate Platform
products.description: Proprietary platform for discovering and developing precision radiopharmaceuticals using miniproteins of 40-70 amino acids to target solid tumors with alpha-emitting radioisotopes.

partnerships.partner_name: Multiple domestic and international isotope suppliers
partnerships.description: Priority access agreements for actinium-225 supply to ensure supply chain continuity and redundancy.
Partnerships for drug product production to create redundancies across supply chain components.
